title: dicliptera roxburghiana var. bupleuroides
intro: Dicliptera roxburghiana var. bupleuroides is a lesser-known variety of the Dicliptera roxburghiana plant, commonly found in the Himalayan region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dicliptera roxburghiana var. bupleuroides include its ability to alleviate coughs, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory tract irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
